titleStmt.title: SII 10.396: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 396. (A.R. No. 95 of 1917.) AT THE FOOT OF THE FIRST SIDE OF THE SAME PILLAR. Ś. Year not given.

summary.p: This inscription is in the nature of an appendix to the last one and contains a list of land grants made to several persons connected with the temple of Viśvēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cilpi Ācā¨ryyulu śāṁttōju koḍuku guḍḍōjunaku kha 2 Akkanāla baiyya
pōju koḍuku prōlōjunaku kha 1 śrīmatu rācagurudēvara Ānatikramamuna śrīma
tu kāśīśvaraśivāAyyaṁgaru sānivrittulu peṭṭina vaiyinamu . prōlāṁḍiseṭṭi kuṁttuṟu kāmnalaAkka
sāniki kha 1 tu 10 . nalla dēviseṭṭikuṁttuṟu nalamarāsaniki kha 1 tu 10 . samayamaṁtri kuṁttu
ṟu viśvēśvaramāṇikhyānaku kha 1 tu 10 . Āṁḍari kuṁttuṟu gōḷagirimāṇikhyānaku kha 1 tu 10 .
vīrabhadravaiyiragi Āṁḍariki kha 1 tu 10 . saṁkuvennajiya kumareku tu 17 . vēmana
bōyini kuṁtuṟu komasaniki kha 1 tu 10 . prōlabōya kuṁtuṟu komasāniki kha 1 tu 10 . truṭṭa
pāmu kommasāniki kha 1 tu 10 . ttruṭṭapāmu guṭṭasāniki kha 1 tu 10 . venasāni kūṁttu
sāniki vritti kha 1 na 10 . ḍupalemalleni manumaṟalu pātralusāni
ki kha 1 tu 10 . sū¨ryyadēvani kūṁtuṟu tirumuttasāniki kha 1 na 10 . velaṁkapūṁḍi
sōmanatadēvaraku kha 2 Āstānapati tripura ya pillapradiṣṭiṁcina gaṇēśvaruniki na 3
śrīviśvanatadēvaraguḍi panicēsi kā
se Ānōjunaku kha 1 nannapōju
naku kha 1 ponnōjunaku kha 1
ṁṭikūṁtulu modalamaku gōkananūṁ
gōkana na 10 śrīviśvanāthadēvara
māṁdirikēsari kha 1 virigo
sānikikēsari kha 1 Āko (incomplete )
Note.—This inscription is in the nature of an appendix to the big Sanskrit inscription A.R. No. 94 of 1917 inscribed on the same pillar and must be read along with that inscription.
Digital edition of SII 10.396 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
